SocialHub.title: Aẓeḍ n Uyafar Izemmurayen
SocialHub.subtitle: Sefrek tawaliwin-ik n uyafar izemmurayen d inayli.
SocialHub.connect_meta_desc: Qqen isebtar-ik d imiḍanen-ik izemmurayen i turni n inayli imigaw. Sɛu ara izri-ik n Instagram izemmurayen yettwaqqenen γef usebtar n Facebook.
SocialHub.connect_tiktok_desc: Seqdec amiḍan-ik n TikTok akken ad tkecmeḍ ad tiniɣ-d ividyuwan umbaɛed.
SocialHub.beta_alert: Adebbaɛ amekli n Instagram d TikTok akka-agi yenna-yas d aṛegraw i ɣaren-t (Beta Usrigen). Tafra-a ad d-yexlaq i umdan azal kan.

LandingPage.hero_h1_seo: RiveHub — Agdil n Umheyyaq n Tsuqquft
LandingPage.hero_description: Yal mukeddas yessefk awal-is. Mačči d ifecka yettwabḍun. RiveHub yettamegza tmahelt-ik, yettahegge tlext-ik, d yettegber tagrawt-ik seg uɣubel n usrag azal kan.
LandingPage.hero_bg_alt: Tsuqquft taɛezzayent s terfant n tmeẓliyin sɛan tagrawt s waṭas
LandingPage.features_card1_title: Aẓar n Usegru d Isenfuyen Yemsizzwaren
LandingPage.features_card1_desc: AI yettawali ajeggay-ik n isefka n temgeldit sɛan-t yettaslay tamegza i wesen yessabakin, id yettarawan ne tagrawt-ik.
LandingPage.features_card2_desc: Taɣuri n diri i tilas n tlawin n tageɣda.
LandingPage.features_card3_desc: Inerfas-a ixeddem s tutlawin ifrasen n brigad tsuqquft-ik.
LandingPage.philosophy_bg_alt: Taɛekkumt n unekcum n yinig n tsuqquft
LandingPage.philosophy_intro: Taɣuri n tsuqquft ass-a d amezwaru aqal — war afessar, teccilh.
LandingPage.philosophy_vision: RiveHub d awal-ik yi yettwabeddel azegdaɛ seg uccil.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_desc: RiveHub mačči daɣen yettarewwel taẓuri-ik — yettegber-itt s isefka yettazen-itt i yal umdan n tagrawt s {count} n tutlawin. Ulac asagm.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_title: Tifeɣ n tlext s useggem n wakal
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_desc: Yal asen n isefka yettawin d tifeɣ i wakal. Asonar n RiveHub yeţţa-as-d lekcem qbel ad temmecwed.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar3_desc: Wayd-ma tesɛiḍ sseruggel, wayd-ma tagellunt-ik tesɛa ɣef unekcum. D taẓuri-ik — mačči d nneɣ.
LandingPage.hero_loss_hook: Yal ass bla isefka d aḥemmez uɣef.
LandingPage.calculator_title: Manka-tt tlext n uccil i tečč?
LandingPage.calculator_subtitle: Ẓer taɣzi n usdeg war yejma n isefka n tayemmat.
LandingPage.social_proof_banner: Yettaɣen i tsuqqef taɛezzayent di Quebec
LandingPage.protocol_desc: IQ n tsuqquft-ik yesɛa teggura s yal uqqin.
LandingPage.protocol_phase1_desc: Yiwet n taqeffalt, d RiveHub yebda ad isɛa iḍes n usrag.
LandingPage.protocol_phase2_desc: Turagt-ik taqdimt tewwet-d tilisa i yal taɛwajt.
LandingPage.protocol_phase3_desc: 30 n iseggen n uxbibir azal kan ɣer wass d usysteam-ik yegga-d 92% n wusilef.
LandingPage.footer_desc: Tussna tudlent i restaurants n gastronomie.
LandingPage.features_card1_ai_suggestion: Mmel agraw-nni, snulfuɣ ufus-nni daɣ akka.
LandingPage.features_card3_target_text: Limpiar la zona fría de las neveras
LandingPage.nano_banana_subtitle: Tali-d arbaɛ ifecka imaynuten i usefru n restaurant bunan.
LandingPage.nb_haccp_desc: Rnu izerfan-ik n usenqad s tdlant. Taɣellist n aẓar n uzger, s usifed udlent ɣef usalen.
LandingPage.nb_sonar_desc: Asferdis n ucef. Mmel isenfifla, ẓer yal amgal deg ukbiyen, ɣef usmel n tignac n tqabilt-ik.
LandingPage.nb_ocr_desc: Tesɛad tuggna? Aru-t. Claude AI yecɛad akk imeslayen, tidusi, d igumma. Yemmut uselway s uzawl.
LandingPage.nb_voice_title: 4. Aseɣti n Smart Prep Voice AI
LandingPage.nb_voice_desc: Ini isefra-ik n tsefkart. Whisper V3 Turbo AI (aḥil, s senyal snat) isekcem tinaḍ ɣef teɛtirt n yisqedcen.
LandingPage.f1_desc: Seggem ighufa. Yisenfifla n tqabilt, warraw n ṛeḥ, d tmeẓla n icuggaren ttusefren s AI.
LandingPage.f1_ex1: Aɣmis warraw n ṛeḥ (m: "Iceɣrum 2 iḥallal, mekanik issewwaḍ").
LandingPage.f1_ex2: Azen tisefra-d tarwa i tqabilt n yimecwaṛen.
LandingPage.f1_ex3: Mmel tmeẓla n icuggaren i ubeddel n yisumar.
LandingPage.f2_desc: Aɣmis-ik, iteddu s ufus. Seg tezmert n yiceɣra ar yiles n uziw, RiveHub isefren akk isenfifla ɣef usmekti d uzenziber.
LandingPage.f2_ex1: Iceɣrum yedda 8°C: tanumi n umahel "Seḥwej neɣ sekkser aẓar n uzger".
LandingPage.f3_desc: War yixxef n tutlayt. Akk icuggaren ttiqren asferdis d yisenfifla deg tutlayt-nsen.
LandingPage.f3_ex1: Ucef iḍun s Tespanyolit, amexlaf iḍun s Tabengalit.
LandingPage.f3_ex2: Tkaraten n tummatt ttewwint daɣ akka n akked imecwaṛen imaynuten.
LandingPage.f3_ex3: Tiwaliyin n taɣellist sɛan ɣef uselway deg wayen ara d-yas.
LandingPage.integrations_banner: Yettalsay s usget ɣer nnafaq-ik n POS: Toast, Square, SumUp, Stripe, Lightspeed, Zettle...
LandingPage.f4_desc: Aggar-ik n Yidles yettalsay ɣer POS-ik iwakken ad ittissergamen tadrimt n ifecka s yiles s umata akken d useqqat n umsa.
LandingPage.f4_ex1: Kter-d s wudem awurman tadrimt-ik n ifecka seg Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, neɣ Lightspeed.
LandingPage.f4_ex2: Ssiwel "Ibeṛṛuyen" d "Izekkla" n yidessen s yiẓri n Tanafunt n Useqdec n Waya.
LandingPage.f4_ex3: Anagraw ur yettalsay ara? Unegmas-nneɣ n RiveHub yesbedd s udem awurman akken d usekcum CSV.
LandingPage.f5_desc: Seggem amara akken ad teskecmeḍ agris n umsa s ufus. Unegmas yesenṭel imaslugen, iqedren, d iseqdacen seg udellal n yewwi iwakken ad tesseduḍ imernuyin-ik s umata.
LandingPage.f5_ex1: Gcem tudruyt n uferdis-ik n umqun deg uswayad.
LandingPage.f5_ex2: Asenfal n yeggaṛ-ameggaṛ s tuzuk d iwelwalen n wesseɣti n iseqdacen.
LandingPage.f5_ex3: Alecwaḍ n uskar akken d aseqqat n umsa n imiẓiwer-ik s umata.
LandingPage.f6_desc: Seggem imagraden imaynuten s yiswan ifenfar n yiqran-ik n ileqman tesɣa s yiwen uɣleb.
LandingPage.f6_ex1: Snulfa azwel ifenfar i wacennar n Valentine s idduqqan imeyyazin.
LandingPage.f6_ex2: Ssenteg s wudem awurman iswan-ik iwakken ad d-gezzum imagraden n ubred.
LandingPage.f6_ex3: Snulfa uneɣmas ifenfar i ucerzer-ik ɣef nnafaq n ewwi (UberEats, Deliveroo).
LandingPage.f7_desc: Ssergamen meṛṛa yiqran imaynuten seg Libro, Resy, akken d Zenchef. Webhooks akken d usmired awurman iwakken ad tessalaḍ aqedren n isgazen.
LandingPage.f7_ex1: Qqim tiweṭṭafin n sned s umata bla asebridh n ufus.
LandingPage.f7_ex2: Ssesgem isgazen iḥudan, wayen d-yessufɣen, d wid ur d-yssenqaden deg yiwen ubecciw.
LandingPage.f7_ex3: Ssergamen isefka n uqcic iwakken ad d-tilḥud azday n tikelt-ik n ubeddel.
LandingPage.f8_desc: Usmired n Sonar yessebridhen isgazen iḥudan-ik, ileqman n ifecka, akken d ikaṛdaṛ iwakken ad d-ssiwel s wudem awurman tabdirt n udebber.
LandingPage.f8_ex1: Cwiṭ iqedren n meṛṛa yidessen yal aṛad seg yiqran yellan s tansuffeɣ.
LandingPage.f8_ex2: Ssergam imaslugen iqquren i wakken ad tesbeggiwḍ ṭṭarefla umaynuɣ.
LandingPage.f8_ex3: Qedr useqqat n umsa ifenduɣ uqbel ma tebɣiḍ deg zik.
LandingPage.f6_mock_caption: Issin tagumt n dda-agi! Azref n tna n ibubriwin... ✨ Azref n tebratin d tid 👇
LandingPage.tier_essential_desc: Asggas d umeẓla i uqader n unebdu n wussan-ik.
LandingPage.tier_performance_desc: Aqader-ik n tedyanin akken ad tazzalt ɣur yisengal izummren.
LandingPage.tier_intelligence_desc: Tamuẓ n tedyanin s tigmi akken ad tsuddem taggara s wudem awurtan.
LandingPage.f9_desc: Asuddem seg tikwal. Sefhem azal n ikeggaf, sudmed iseggan n uɣref s yiwet n tmiḍi, qqen tamusni timsellit tawurtan.
LandingPage.f9_ex1: Ḥder azara seg ikeggaf d imidr imi ur tterrud ara ɣur teqerḍurt n wugar.
LandingPage.f9_ex2: Sudmed abrid n ukfayed icqqen ger ivendren n POS d asuddem n wudrum.
LandingPage.f9_ex3: Sefhem ibabren-ik seg usnulfu ar ukeggaf s azal azbar.
LandingPage.f10_desc: Ɣer aseggas n tajumma n umager-ik. Taseffart d waman d isuddem s wayyur akken ad tesselsed tazart send ma d-yefk uɣerbaz.
LandingPage.f10_ex1: Sudmed asaḍuf n taseffart s wayyur.
LandingPage.f11_desc: Asulif n umalu n wussan-ik d insɣisen izzizen akken ad teskerduḍ tedyanin-ik. RiveHub d-yessaḍm kul dollar i d-yecḍan d kul gram i d-yerran.
LandingPage.f11_ex1: Asentem seg tansa n tjumma n lmadal n tura.
LandingPage.f11_ex2: Axeddim n usideg ger iseddaɣen d imuqqes.
LandingPage.f11_ex3: Asuddem azarbi n tmehla akken ad tufiḍ imuqren.
LandingPage.f3_source_example: Sfeḍ taḥricwin s umata a dduṛ.
LandingPage.f3_target_example: Limpia el suelo a fondo esta noche.
LandingPage.journey_subtitle: Isefra-ik ad sɛedin. Unagraw-ik ad yesseɛlem. Tiɣimiyin-ik ad sɛedin tilemmast.
LandingPage.journey_phase0_desc: Asonar-ik yesɛa amezruy n yiɣallen id ɣ d-yezzan. Tasemtayt taqerjit n tigenni.
LandingPage.journey_phase0_f2: Aqeffar n tigenni id ɣ d-yezzan
LandingPage.journey_phase1_desc: Tura tḥemmleḍ izerfan n usmenyafrareq. Taḥecṭut tamagdut d-yettifren.
LandingPage.journey_phase2_desc: Taḥecṭut tummidt n umara. Tiɣmert n tinceltinin tzemmer deg yal tigmi.
LandingPage.journey_phase3_desc: Unagraw-ik AI yesseɛlem izerfan-ik imettiyen. 92% n tɣecṭa n uffiren.
LandingPage.brigade_desc: Amun d-yegber zik mi ara tessatay tasiwelt. RiveHub yessidir taɣasa n tinceltinin aḍrimen ɣ d-yezzin seg ubrid γ d imuri.
LandingPage.brigade_f1_desc: S ugar n 25 tutlayin timennuɣin, tafeckatin ttzen s tispanit akken ara ttettecen s tibenǧlit. Abridge d-yella akk fell.
LandingPage.brigade_f2_desc: Tilisten taɣecṭin d usselmed awḥas zeggelen azal n 60% n wakud n usmerni. Sseggem imɛeccumen ixeddmen udem-senni qbel tawacult tamezwarut.
LandingPage.brigade_f3_desc: Idukklen n tafecka d usmideg n tawacult ur d izen amawel mi ara sfelmant. Ttzeggel wallen taḥecṭut d tameɣtut.
LandingPage.gamification_desc: Amek yella teggalt taḥecṭut-ik? Ger-d asuddes n 2-n tisdatin i d-tessedmert tɣecṭa-ik n tmara d sfelmant n tilisa.

Pricing.title: Sgayen isselen, tajmaa izummren.
Pricing.subtitle: Bdu s wudem uluɣ, ugar-d ticki tebɣiḍ.
Pricing.badge_free: Bdu s wudem uluɣ — ulac azetta n uɣerbaz
Pricing.tier_essential_desc: Tajumma taḥeqqant d umengal akken ad tessagzed tanegemt-ik n yisem.
Pricing.tier_performance_desc: Asonar-ik n Tɣimiwin akken ad tessenwim ifrawren ifaḍilawen d iɣumad.
Pricing.tier_enterprise_desc: Asartay n yismal medden s tutricht teknikant yettwaḍferren.
Pricing.tier_intelligence_desc: Taẓrayt n tɣimiwin s ilɣa akken ad tessagzem azeqqa berru.
Pricing.waste_calculator_subtitle: Ssenqad tasmeslayt war aksum n tlummiwin n yisem.
Pricing.enterprise_custom_desc: Taselmedt taɣburt, yismal medden, asṛaẓ asendiq, d usmenyif.
Pricing.footer_desc: Tussna talɣunt i tɣerfiwin n ussan.
Pricing.nano_banana_subtitle: Sken-d akkin ifecka n tnezzut i usmeslay n tɣerfet war amahay.
Pricing.nb_haccp_desc: Smeslay taɣbalyin-ik n uḥsas akken d asecda. Tabaḍnit n ussan asendiq, ittwaḥwisen d ibbwelen.
Pricing.nb_sonar_desc: Adabu n Uqanac. Err-d isuffren, ẓar-d imtibawen n tgumma, yerna seghlek tanerfust n tnegrit ɣef umata.
Pricing.nb_ocr_desc: Yella-k tburt? Gcem tasiwelt. Claude AI iḥukka-d s snat tillurin, ussan d ixemmiḍen. Tuffra n uxeddem n ufus.
Pricing.nb_voice_desc: Ssit-ik izerfan n usmulti d tulmisin. Whisper V3 Turbo AI (akecwaḍ, tutlayin sin) iseɣti yerna issef-ik i tmura.
Pricing.features_title: Meṛṛa ifecka i tzemreḍ ad temsizrewseḍ, deg yiwet n tḥawalt.
Pricing.f1_desc: Senker inibriyen ur isiggen ara. Tagutti n tsekla, wuggaden n ifecka, d yiḍṛisen n tmura, tttwassnen, tttwasadben, yerna Claude AI ireccem-iten.
Pricing.f1_ex1: Senked ufrug n ifecka (s udeg: "Tanfarit 2 yettaxelif, aḥebbaz-ameẓiyn iqedda").
Pricing.f1_ex2: Azen tilmisin n umasay i tsekla n aḍad.
Pricing.f1_ex3: Ẓar iḍṛisen n yizarfan (iɣallen) akken ad ɣur-ik tabaḍnit n tezmert.
Pricing.f2_desc: Adagim-ik, s uswaqef. Seg d waɣwanen n tgumma alɣa d yifecka n ziǧǧ, RiveHub ireccem akk d yesseggax isuff qbel ad d-awin.
Pricing.f2_ex1: Tanfarit tekker ɣer 8°C: talɣut i tmeslayit "Seḥqem neɣ kkes aceggan n ceggan".
Pricing.f2_ex2: Alɣu n usmulti i yisseɣḥen n yifecka n ziǧǧ.
Pricing.f2_ex3: Tiɣwatin HACCP tsewwalen, deg umehraz n uɣaliv.
Pricing.f3_title: Asmaɣ S Tarelli Deg {count} N Tutlayin
Pricing.f3_desc: Tajmat n tutlay ur tella ara axel. Meṛṛa amdan iɛeddi ɣer upobrugram d ismula-s s tutlay-is nmaɛna.
Pricing.f3_ex1: Uqanac aru-ik s Taspaynit, amazir-ifecka iɛedda s Tabengali.
Pricing.f3_ex2: Tificka n ṛecept-a ak-inegmen s akecwaḍ i meṛṛa amdan amaynut.
Pricing.f3_ex3: Tilmisin n taɣellist issen-t kra, d alasa d amdan.
Pricing.f4_title: Tamatart n Uskar & Tintict n POS
Pricing.f4_desc: Azeṭṭa-ik n Tefaṛ iqqen ɣer POS akken ad yiẓar tilas n uzekka s uxeddim n ṛac-a. Qqum amend n talɣut n useqqac s uswaqef.
Pricing.f4_ex1: Siggez s uswaqef afrux-ik seg Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, neɣ Lightspeed.
Pricing.f4_ex2: Ẓar "Igenwan" d "Aɣellal" n usmunti s tamatart n uskar.
Pricing.f4_ex3: Asebdad ur yemɛaban? RiveHub AI iḍfar yerna isigger CSV akk-a.
Pricing.f5_title: Asseɣḥen Amek N OCR N Tburt
Pricing.f5_desc: Senker asɣum n tburt s ufus. AI iḥukka-d tasẓunt, ifarziyen, d tilas seg-asen alɣa akken ad issewwel tax-ik n tisfukt.
Pricing.f5_ex1: Gcem tasiwelt n tburt n umḥerraz, deg umehraz.
Pricing.f5_ex2: Asseɣḥen tasẓunt-tasẓunt d alɣu n usnerni n tẓuri i ifarziyen.
Pricing.f5_ex3: Lweqt d swaqef ttwasuḥdi n Tax-ik n usmunti.
Pricing.f6_desc: Tleḍ izarfan amaynut s isufaṛ ixeddmen ifecka-ik n tutlayt deg yiwet n tiggit.
Pricing.f6_ex1: Siggez aḥerfi d taggaḍt i umuray n Valentine s emojis tidelt.
Pricing.f6_ex2: Asmaɣ s uswaqef n isufaṛ-ik akken ad tleḍ izarfan izerfunen.
Pricing.f6_ex3: Melmed aḥerfi akecwaḍ i tiṭfaras-ik (UberEats, Deliveroo).
Pricing.f7_desc: Intict meṛṛa ttalyin-ik seg Libro, Resy, yerna Zenchef. Webhooks d swaqef akken ad tsizeṛgeḍ s ṛac-a.
Pricing.f7_ex1: Ṛec ttalyin online s akecwaḍ ger-an uxeddim n ufus.
Pricing.f7_ex2: Mged yizarfan i d-ittafen, yir-a d iḍ-uggaden, deg yiwet tabaḍnit.
Pricing.f7_ex3: Asaḍ izawelen n yizarfan akken ad temmestnaḍ azal n usservi-ik.
Pricing.f8_desc: Asseɣḥen n Sonar iẓar yizarfan i d-ittafen, azuf n tẓuri, yerna tekatka-d tislimal n ulmed s uswaqef.
Pricing.f8_ex1: Snifel ikram n umḥerraz mebla ttalyin i meṛṛa usmunti.
Pricing.f8_ex2: Terfem d ifarziyen i tεeggaleḍ i tmedlist d-ittiẓen.
Pricing.f8_ex3: Ẓir azal n cargo qbel ad d-tafeḍ iballen.
Pricing.f9_desc: Aseɣḥen amek i daxel. Seḥkem tilas n keg, ẓar tasaḍut n uggaz, yerna xdem takabran n ufrar n micro-brewery.
Pricing.f9_ex1: Aheggal akken tɣammen isufra d ifessawen seg tmidir n wakal n lexas.
Pricing.f9_ex2: Ɛass-d amḍiq n lexas yellan deg ubeddil (variance) gar asɛeddu POS d imḥacaten n uẓar.
Pricing.f9_ex3: Sefrek isafaṛen n tesɛertayin seg wṭelqiwen d ubeddil ɣer keg s uɛad igguden.
Pricing.journey_subtitle: Isefra-ik ṭṭsen. Inagraw-ik yettaẓar. Tiferkit-ik ṭqeqqent.
Pricing.journey_phase0_desc: Asonar-ik yesɛa imeddukal i d-iteddren. Tameddit taqecuṛt n ugurev.
Pricing.journey_phase1_desc: Ssenket-ik tasnaẓunt n yizamulen iqburen. Tifeffit n uẓar tettbeṛ.
Pricing.journey_phase2_desc: Tameddit tugganen n useddu. Tsasa n yinfesayen tteqqim deg yal tiferkit.
Pricing.journey_phase3_desc: Inagraw-ik n AI yegber idellalen-ik n urgal. 92% tasadawit n usikuf.
Pricing.brigade_desc: Taẓewwa tgeḍ akken tuttiwin ttbedlen. RiveHub iselka tabaxabt taceḍ, tuggi d taceḍ, ɣer tegduda tiacwalen.
Pricing.brigade_f1_desc: S 25+ tuttiwin n lebḥir i d-yusuqen, tisufra d-issuffuɣen s Tspenyulit ara d-yettwaqra s Tbengalit. Asenqas yegber allak akka.
Pricing.brigade_f2_desc: Tibufist tameddulist n usnerni d yinigen n tamussniwt i ssewwlen asefru s 60%. Ffeɣ inelmaden timaynutin i dilla d tidawt taqburt.
Pricing.brigade_f3_desc: Tasubaxt n useggaṛ d usmiren n tejga ur d asufɣes mi ara d-ssenqas. Mqel taḥgut timegras s ulogbook ibanen.
Pricing.gamification_desc: Akken am tameggit tameddit-ik? Rnu tasudewt n 2 n yisen i wakken ad tafem tasadawit n useddu-ik d isnerni n umḍiq.

Auth.error_auth: Imayl neɣ awal uffir ur nmeɣtaḍ ara.
Auth.error_empty: Ma ulac aɣbula, sekcem azal n meṛṛa yiɣallen (awal uffir: 6 n yizra deg yilem).
Auth.error_confirm: Asbeddi n 'Senqed imayl' yezga d-irmed ɣ Supabase. Sens-it ɣ Authentication > Providers > Email i tesɛediḍ War isenqed n imayl.
Auth.error_name_too_short: Isem n tkaẓunt yessefk ad yili d azal n 2 n yizra.
Auth.error_name_too_long: Isem n tkaẓunt-ik yettwam-d (80 n yizra d akessar).
Auth.error_name_gibberish: Ma ulac aɣbula, sekcem isem n tkaẓunt amedday.
Auth.error_turnstile: Iɛeggal n tɣellist ur yeddi ara. Ɛreḍ tikelt-nniḍen.

Dashboard.setup_menu_desc: Rnu imeθlawen-ik i wakken ad tegzem Unaẓar n Usensali.
Dashboard.setup_pos_desc: Smeqqel azal-ik akken ad tesliḍ tanaḍt taqrart.

CGU.title: Tuccḍiwin n Useqdac — RiveHub
CGU.s1_p1: RiveHub d talɣa n software-as-a-service (SaaS) i d-yettunefken i yimegdaden n tesnakkaliwin, inamuqnayen, d isganen n useqdac n tiɣimt, akken ad tt-aǧjin deg tmaɣra-nsen tanummurt s ufus n isewwalen n AI d talɣa i d-yettwaxdam ɣef isefra. Taseqwit tettmahel ɣef **rivehub.com**.
CGU.s1_p2: Talɣa-agi tettmahel, gar wayen nniḍen, afus-a yezgan:
CGU.s1_l1: **Adlis n tmaɣra s tanit** — Asirew n tuccḍiwin i d-yettunefken s AI, asuddem n wawal-i ɣer wawal, tanemmirt n urgal, d isumal ɣef tubeddilt
CGU.s1_l2: **Asuqel n tezmert** — Tagrewt, taɛrirt n tummatin, d isumal n ubeddel HACCP
CGU.s1_l3: **Asefsu n umuɣ** — Tilawt, abeddel, d tabeɛlist n umuɣ s tummagt n QR code d usiǧǧew-iw aɛassan
CGU.s1_l4: **Taɛrirt n tecraḥt n tmaɣra** — Asiḍ awurman n umḍiq yal asaḍ, asefsu n tsutrin d imaɣallen, asuqel n tqimt, d isiggaden n tkaruz
CGU.s1_l5: **Tachartita n umuɣ** — Asuddem n umuɣ deg usaḍ BCG-matrix (Izar, Asaḍ, Amsedday, Aɣrem) s isumal i d-yettunefken s AI
CGU.s1_l6: **Asuddem n talemmast d uxabar (OCR)** — Taɛrirt n tẓuri s AI akken ad d-afus isefra seg talemmast d uxabar
CGU.s1_l7: **Tigejda n isermem** — Timselḍit awurman i d-yettunefken seg-si ɣef theggi d isefra-iqburen
CGU.s1_l8: **Asefsu n theggi** — Asuddem ɣef tanegrilt n tefras d isiggadem n umḍiq n imdanen
CGU.s1_l9: **Aẓar n tsenselkiwin** — Tilawt n ugbur i d-yettunefken s AI i Instagram, Facebook, d TikTok
CGU.s1_l10: **Asuqel n isemgertay d umi-d-issuffren** — Asebdad n ccna d akudan, tagrewt n aggur, d isumal ɣef ubeddel
CGU.s1_l11: **Asuqel n idenflayn d umḍiq** — Tagrewt n umḍiq yinni d asuddem ɣef izbaln
CGU.s1_l12: **Asniḍ n tɣerfant (Le Nid)** — Talɣa n uqerru, asiḍ n umḍiq sḍig, d usiǧǧew n uɣeṛ
CGU.s1_l13: **Asuqel n tmeɣra n tasaft** — Asuqel n seɛda d wakal
CGU.s1_p3: RiveHub d **talɣa i usnizwar**. Ur teɛeddi ara azal n uhertala n igenni, d telɣa n igenni, neɣ n tignatin n useqdac ɣef yiwen umata.
CGU.s2_p1: Deg tuccḍiwin-agi, awal-agi sɛan tazwara-nni i d-yettunefken ddaw:
CGU.s2_d1_def: Talɣa n RiveHub i yettmahel ɣef rivehub.com, acuran n yisawalen-ines, APIs, d iserapin i d-yettunefken.
CGU.s2_d2_def: Ayinaw neɣ ay aẓur aganaw i d-yessaggur-d amiḍan ɣef talɣa-a u d-yecguɛ tuccḍiwin-agi.
CGU.s2_d3_def: Asaḍ n useqdac n tiɣimt i d-yessaggur-d useqdac ɣef talɣa-a, d asen-iw amezwaru n tmaɣra.
CGU.s2_d4_def: Isawalen n tseɣbula (LLM) d isawalen n tẓuri i d-yettunefken seg yemdukkal-nniḍen (zik ahat Anthropic / Claude), i d-yettunefken ɣef talɣa-a i taɛrirt, tilawt n ugbur, d asuddem n isefra.
CGU.s2_d5_def: Ayinaw n usentel gar talɣa-a d tallalt nniḍent (sistimu n POS, talɣa n theggi, aẓar n tsenselkiwin) s APIs neɣ webhooks.
CGU.s2_d6_def: Tanommirt n tẓuri - talɣa i d-yessufuɣ-d aṭas d isefra seg tugniwin n wawalen.
CGU.s2_d7_def: Acuran n talɣa i d-yettunefken, i d-yettwalin, neɣ i d-yettunefken useqdac ɣef talɣa-a, acu-k netta d tuccḍiwin, umuɣ, tigejda, tugniwin, issuffren, d usefsu.
CGU.s2_d8_def: Asiggad awurman i d-yessudumen asidel n usenfan d takmilt n isefra n tesnakkalit ɣef talɣa-a.
CGU.s3_title: 3. Taɛvurt, Tiggad n Amiḍan, d Asefsu n Timdukkalin
CGU.s3_s1_p1: Taɛvurt ɣer talɣa-a tesra tilawt n umiḍan s tansa n imayl id ilaqen. Useqdac yecguɛ-d ad d-yefk talɣa tajersant u ad tt-iẓellez.
CGU.s3_s2_p1: Aseqdac-iyi yettwaḍ d amdal n ussaɣ n tignac n tuqqna. Yal tigawt i yettwaxedmen s umiḍan n iseqdacen-a, tettwaman d tagi yexdemen-t iseqdacen-a i tgemmaḍ. Ma yella segmi ɣur-s amedya n uɣeclan deg tignac-ines, issefk i iseqdacen-a ad iɣ-yegren RiveHub s ulac cceccew.
CGU.s3_s3_p1: Amenɣi n umiḍan izmer ad yuɣal-d inelmaden n teɣremt i ueǧǧig n tiseddawt n tassent. Izerfan i yellan d:
CGU.s3_s3_l1: **Amenɣi** — Anekcum ameqqran, tadbelt n ujerred, aɣ-yegrusan akked uɛicen n inelmaden
CGU.s3_s3_l2: **Anedbel** — Anekcum i imodulan n tezrawit d tussna n tassent
CGU.s3_s3_l3: **Aneqbac n teɣremt** — Anekcum n isemman d asistel adeg i yellan i imodulan
CGU.s3_s3_p2: Amenɣi n umiḍan issefk ad yettwaḍ d amdal n tigawatin i xedmen-t inelmaden n teɣremt seg ufus n useɣɣam.
CGU.s3_s4_p1: Deg tallit n 14 n wussan, tugar-d taẓeḍ taγmurt war kcard. Akken ad tqellbeḍ useɣɣam kra n yiseggasen niden, issefk i kečč ad tesneflec alama akked yiwet n ujjer. Isefka i tesɣelmeḍ deg tallit n taẓeḍ, ttawin-t-id.
CGU.s4_p1: RiveHub yettwarreḥ-d ajeqqaq i sseqvaseɛ n zdat iwet n tkayt tazeqqat n wiyaḍ. Iseqdacen-a seγren-d dakken iseɣti-a qed tegget deg tigawatin i xeddmen-t wiyaḍ i uqabel.
CGU.s4_s1_p1: Useɣɣam yettrawweḍ aseɣti akked inagimen n umaɣ-a:
CGU.s4_s1_p2: Isefka n usengel i d-yuɣalen seg iseɣti-a, ttusseɛ-d i usenqel n tɣuḍṛa n imaḍ, asenqel n tali d usenqel n uskar.
CGU.s4_s2_p2: Isefka n tderewt, ttusseɛ-d i usenqel n uṭṭunin n inelmaden akked askar n tusa n uskar.
CGU.s4_s3_p1: Useɣɣam yettawweḍ-d ajeqqaq i tirwa-a i ufessek n ugbur:
CGU.s4_s3_p2: Iseqdacen-a seγren-d RiveHub ad ifeqqes ugbur d isem-nsen ma zedɣen tusut n yal ufessek.
CGU.s4_s4_p1: RiveHub ur yettwaḍ d amdal n asussam, aɣeclan n API, taɣilt n isefka, neɣ asussam i d-yeglan seg useɣɣam n wiyaḍ. Iseqdacen-a issefk ad qimen tignac n useɣɣam d srid, akked asennagel n tzuri n isefka i d-yuɣalen.
CGU.s5_s1_title: 5.1. Azref n iɛelqaten i yettusseɛ-d s tiẓratin
CGU.s5_s1_p1: Useɣɣam yettemmes tiẓratin n usenselmed (LLM akked imuddel n taglent) i d-yeggugent wiyaḍ (Anthropic / Claude). Tiẓratin-a, ttusseɛ-d i:
CGU.s5_s1_l1: Asennagel akked asniqel n tizeqqa n tsawit-inu n useqɣan
CGU.s5_s1_l2: Asnuma n yiseɣrisen i asesru imiḍan (tewjaḥin, tigawatin)
CGU.s5_s1_l3: Asnuɣal n ugbur deg tutlayin n wazal ({count} tutlayin)
CGU.s5_s1_l4: Asexdem n isefka seg tugniwin n ujareb akked ifusen (OCR)
CGU.s5_s1_l5: Asnuma n ugbur akked isexsiren i tigris n tsnawit
CGU.s5_s1_l7: Asnuma n tallisin n uskar i azal n tallit tiqqal akked usenqel
CGU.s5_s1_l8: Asennagel n tɣuḍṛa n imaḍ akked tɣuḍṛa n ufag
CGU.s5_s1_l9: Asenqel n izerfan n tegnawt deg ufeggag n teggant
CGU.s5_s2_title: 5.2. Taguri n tijawwat i yezwa tiẓratin
CGU.s5_s2_p1: **Isnumaten, asennigelten, akked ugbur i d-yezwa tiẓratin i yettemmes RiveHub, ttusseɛ-d i ublay n tiseɣdanin akked tseglawit.** Iseqdacen-a seγren-d akked tḍermect-nsen dakken:
CGU.s5_s2_l1: Isnumaten n tiẓratin **ur d asɣiwren umɛin** deg wayen yellan d tɣellist n imaḍ, tajumma n ilugan, tegnawt, taɣellist n tezdeg, neɣ ayen nniḍen.
CGU.s5_s2_l2: Isnumaten n tiẓratin **ur ḥellun ara** uḍekker n yiǧǧigen imansayen (anadi n tɣellist, aseɣɣaw n tegnawt, aselmad n uskar)
CGU.s5_s2_l3: AI d'acu-d izzan ad d-yefk isefra **ur nettqebbel ara, ur nettmexlet ara, neɣ ur d-ttaɣin ara d akken ilaq** acku seg yisenfar n tutlayt tiqanin.
CGU.s5_s2_l4: **Tagmat n umedya i meṛṛa tiɣriwin n usefrek** — taɣerru n yisaɣ, tiɣriwin n tedrimt, asufuf n ugbur, akked tiɣriwin n tegdudant — **tezga s waḥul ɣef useqsiw**.
CGU.s5_s2_l5: RiveHub **ur d-isnadi ara tagruɣ n legisa** n twennaḍt. Asenfar d asenfar n **tasmahit** n usmeslay, mmi ara d-isnadi.
CGU.s5_s3_l1: **Ssawal akked uskeṛ** akk isefra i d-yefka AI send asebdel deg usefrek
CGU.s5_s3_l2: **Ur sɛin ara azarug ɣef yisefra n AI** i tiɣriwin i yellan deg tmetti n wallaɣ, tmetti n tbaḍnit neɣ adeg n tedrimt n twennaḍt
CGU.s5_s3_l3: **Aḥfez tiẓririn d twettrect** i teflawin, m'ara d-tesɛin asefrek neɣ uhu
CGU.s5_s3_l4: **Azen** akk isefra i yellan d neɣ d acu i d-iteddiren ɣer tkebbay n RiveHub s tarrayt n tferkit n tallelt
CGU.s5_s4_p1: Asuqel s ujjed i d-yefka AI d asefru kan. RiveHub ur d-isnadi ara tagruɣ n uqeggez, timsel neɣ asigen n usuqel, azemmez-d acḥal i yellan di yisufuf n tallalit. Iseqsiwen suffeɣ-d ad sseɛnen isallen n ugdil ssawal s tnemget akked n umawal.
CGU.s5_s5_p1: Isefra i d-yesnefan s ujjed seg wimage (tifattin, ifesnas) acu-d izzan ad sɛen d yisaɣ. Useqsiw yella d azarug i useqsisem n uqeggez n uqalen, yisallen, ismawen n umawen, akked isefra-nniḍen send asebdel deg usefrek neɣ deg usefrek.
CGU.s5_s6_p1: Asbadu n ussanen d asenfar n udaxel i yebɣan tamaɣdut n isefra i d-yeccban. Ur d-ittusker ara d asengal n usmeslay n twennaḍt akked ur d-ittusker ara d asengal n uskeṛ neɣ n askeṛ n tkerrust.
CGU.s5_s7_p1: Asenfar aẓran, d asenfar n usefrek i yellan s ujjed:
CGU.s5_s7_l1: Asabdu n yizdigen seg yiplatefrum iyermiden
CGU.s5_s7_l2: Asefru n umuɣ n tseffaṛt meṛṛa n imezwura
CGU.s5_s7_l4: Aseggem n yisafuran n uskar akked isisen n usefrek
CGU.s5_s7_p2: Tisenfar-agi qqaren s uzarug akked acu d-iteddiren ɣer wayen n yiplatefrum-nniḍen. Useqsiw ur d-isewwi ara azarug ɣef yisefra n usmeslay war askeṛ.
CGU.s5_s8_p1: Afeggag n ugbur i d-yefka AI (isefra, ihacitag, asigen) d isefra n uskeṛ seg useqsiw. RiveHub ur d-isewwi ara tagmat i ugbur i d-yefkan useqsiw di usnagraw, m'ara d-yefki AI aglam.
CGU.s6_s1_p1: RiveHub tasseɛ akked tasesmedi isefra imesdaren s aswir n legisa n Canada (PIPEDA), Quebec (Akta 25), akked, m'ara d-yella, n Taggalt Talewupt (GDPR).
CGU.s6_s2_p1: Asenfar asseɛ akked asesmedi imgrawen-a n isefra:
CGU.s6_s2_l1: **Isefra n uzref** — Isem, tansiwin-imayl, isefra n twennaḍt
CGU.s6_s2_l2: **Isefra n usefrek** — Iɣewwaren n usefrek, asideg n halaḥal, imugerda, isegganen, isenfasen
CGU.s6_s2_l3: **Isefra n tedrimt** — Tiɣri n isenfasen, imuɣ, aseddek, azemmez n meṛṛa n wass, ifesnas i d-yesnefan
CGU.s6_s2_l4: **Isefra n yizdigen** — Amqar n yiqerraben, igaren n wakud, iburuqan n useffuɣ (isabduyen seg yiplatefrum-nniḍen)
CGU.s6_s2_l5: **Isefra n tmenṭiyin** — Azezzeg seg yiwen n uxeddim, tarrayin n tferkit (isabduyen seg yiplatefrum n POS)
CGU.s6_s2_l6: **Isefra n sseqmad** — Asideg n lebla akked n ufrawan
CGU.s6_s2_l7: **Isefra n ugyuḍ** — Iɣewwaren n uzegzeg, akud, akked irewwalen n tseffaṛt
CGU.s6_s2_l8: **Ugbur n wimage** — Ifuyla n tasnakcayt, ifuyla n tifattin akked n ifesnas
CGU.s6_s2_l9: **Isefra n asgugen** — Tiderwin n usefrek, agrawen n tutlayt, iɣewwaren n tuqqna
CGU.s6_s3_p1: Isefra n useqsiw d asekles s tcennaḍ ɣef Supabase (Amazon Web Services). Isefra d iḥrez s uẓiri n tmezwer. Tanagmert n ugraw tesɛa taḥcurt n umḥadar n isefra eggig n twennaḍin.
CGU.s6_s4_p1: Acu d isefra i d-yettwasebdelen ɣer yiplatefrum-nniḍen n AI (Anthropic) i tesmedi (askeṛ n yiɣewwaren, OCR, asufuf n ugbur). RiveHub yenṭṭef i wudemde n uqqel n isefra imesdaren i d-yettwasebdelen akked asgugen n isefra kan i yellan n leqdac. Isebdelen-agi d isbeggem s tiseqwatin n usuter n yiplatefrum-nniḍen.
CGU.s6_s5_p1: Isefra i d-yettwasabduden seg yiplatefrum n POS, iplatefrum n yizdigen akked n usnagraw d asebdel s tarrayin n APIs-agi. RiveHub asseɛ kan isefra i yellan n leqdac i usefrek n idukkula akhed ur d-isekles ara izerfanen n tkerrust n teggujda n useqsiw.
CGU.s6_s6_p1: S aswir n legisan i yellan, useqsiw sɛa tiɣriwin-agi:
CGU.s6_s6_l1: **Taɣrawt n usnas** — Geṛ asil n isefra imesdaren
CGU.s6_s6_l2: **Taɣrawt n tasuqart** — Asawal n isefra ur d-ttaɣin ara
CGU.s6_s6_l3: **Taɣrawt n tuqqna** — Asuter n tuqqna n isefra imesdaren
CGU.s6_s6_l4: **Taɣrawt n tserwict** — Geṛ isefra s uqeggez n tutmirt i d-yessawḍen
CGU.s6_s6_l5: **Izref ad ur-tseḥbibeḍ** — Seḥbibec ɣef uswir n yisefka i wuswiren idiganen
CGU.s6_s6_l6: **Izref ad tesseḍfed tiṛuhemt** — Sesseḍfed tiṛuhemt ɣef uswir n yisefka di kra n wakud
CGU.s6_s6_p2: Iwakken ad isemres yimeddukal-agi izrif-agi, yezmer ad yeccwal RiveHub s yisem n tecṛa yellan deg ubaragin 13.
CGU.s6_s7_p1: Isefka n yimeddukal ttwasenfaren i yiseggasen n trabbut tarmadt taddat, tanumi-d 30 n wussan i gra n tuqqna, i wakken ad yili aswir n usiti n yisefka. Deffir n tiseggatin-agi, isefka ttumḥiẓen s umata, cceṛ kra n tiserreḥt taqanunit.
CGU.s6_s8_p1: Yimeddukal ay yeṭṭef tamnikaṭ amezzuɣ n yisefka meṛṛa d-yettwasecṛen, d-yettwazegglen, neɣ d-yettwaɣran seg ufus n uswir-agi. RiveHub ur ay-teṭṭef tamnikaṭ ɣef yisefka n yimeddukal.
CGU.s7_s1_p1: Uswir RiveHub, d isefka-s imdanen, taẓegmirt, ilugan n uswir, tasday, d tabratt, ttemmestiren s iseggasen n tamellit n ubrid n Kanada d yimiḍḍen. Uguim deg ujagaren-agi ur ay-tesɛa yimeddukal aṭas n izrif ɣef wuguim-agi, neɣ izref n seqdec deg tjara n trabbut tarmadt.
CGU.s7_s2_p1: Yimeddukal ay yeṭṭef yisefra meṛṛa n ugbur d-yettwasecṛen deg uswir (tignatin, talemmast, tuggiwin, tugniwin, isefka n tmusni). Yimeddukal ay-tesɛa RiveHub tasiregt tideffirt, tarmeṭin, d tarucreḍ ibeqqeṛ akken ad iswir agbur-agi kan f umma n usewwel n uswir.
CGU.s7_s3_p1: Agbur d-yettwaɣren seg ubrid n unegmisen s yisul n yimeddukal (isemgit n uẓeṛ-aɣrum, igrumman, iseggalin, iwelqat) ay-d-yettwasken i yimeddukal iwakken ad iseqdec s tjara war wagi. RiveHub ur ay-tecqal tasiregt ɣef agbur-agi.
CGU.s8_title: 8. Trabbut tarmadt, taseft, d izren n uswir
CGU.s8_s1_l1: **Azemmum** — Aɣmis n uswir, amaẓin n tallemmast, aseggal i miḍḍen n tutlayin, kanaḷ n uẓeṛ-aɣrum
CGU.s8_s1_l2: **Aẓiḍ** — Izren azemmum + ubessem n tqeffalt n yimi, isuli, aẓiḍ n tallemmast
CGU.s8_s1_l3: **Aswir** — Izren aẓiḍ + tiberatin n usbeddi, isuti n taxxamt, asceggel n wanagar
CGU.s8_s1_l4: **Tussna** — Izren aswir + agbur n tmusni n tqeffalt, ubrid n unegmisen amecṭuḥ, tqeffalt n leǧmay
CGU.s8_s1_l5: **Asqamu** — Izren tussna + aseggel n wigen n yiɣlumnawen, taɣmist idigana, asizdeg
CGU.s8_s1_p2: RiveHub ay-tesɛa izref ad ẓreg agbur n izren n trabbut tarmadt. Aṭas n ubeddel d-yettawin izren idiganen ad ttwazmern s talɣa n 30 n wussan.
CGU.s8_s2_p1: Trabbut tarmadt ttwasefren yal amezi neɣ yal aseggwas s yiwen n wudem n yimeddukal, seg uleqqem n taseft idigana Stripe. Iswiren ay-d-yettwasken di dinar Akanada (CAD) cceṛ tangalt tiyaḍ. Tikta taqanunit ay-tettwaznuz ɣef yisem d-yettwaskilen.
CGU.s8_s3_p1: Trabbut tarmadt i yil amezi ur ay-tettwasutar i tseggit tarmadt tadiggant. I trabbut tarmadt i yil aseggwas, asuter aḥif yezmer ad yettawssen seg-wayen-s deg 14 n wussan deffir n ureggel. Deffir n tiseggatin-agi, ur ad ibbi asuter.
CGU.s8_s4_p1: Yimeddukal ay-yezmer ad ẓreg izren n trabbut tarmadt di kra n wakud seg yisettayen n ukaunt. Usmekti ay-d-yettaker s tawala. Asuffes ay-d-yettaker di lameɛ n tseggit tarmadt d-icheffren, s usudel ɣef izren n uswir acebbak alamma d akud-nni.
CGU.s9_s1_p1: Uswir ay-d-yettwasken "am akken-da" d "am seqsumen." RiveHub ur ay-tesɛa ugaren wa uswir ad ibin war d tuccḍiwin, war war d asawen, war d idignan, neɣ yettwaḥes i wuswir idigana.
CGU.s9_s2_p1: Deg uguim-ala RiveHub, yisemmidanen-is, ymeẓyanen, neɣ iẓewwagen ad yettreffew ɣef:
CGU.s9_s2_l1: Araram n tmusni d-yezgan seg isefka n ubrid n unegmisen d-yettwasecṛen neɣ d-yettwazegglen seg uleqqem n tugniwin
CGU.s9_s2_l2: Tikta taqanunit d-yezgan seg usedel ɣef iwelqat n uswir
CGU.s9_s2_l3: Araram n yimi neɣ n uswir d-yezgan seg iwelqat n ubrid n unegmisen
CGU.s9_s2_l4: Tuccḍiwin n isefka d-yettwazeɣlen seg wuswiren ibabeḍ (POS, isuti n taxxamt)
CGU.s9_s2_l5: Agbur d-yettwasbeddin seg yimeddukal ɣef uẓeṛ-aɣrum, d akken ay-yettwaɣren seg uswir
CGU.s9_s2_l6: Asawen n uswir d-yezgan seg yibabeḍ (asennag, ibabeḍ n ubrid n unegmisen, ileqamten ibabeḍ)
CGU.s9_s3_p1: Asḥel n RiveHub ɣef yimeddukal ay-d-yettwahḍer ɣef tisefra n trabbut tarmadt d-yettwazegglen s tafat seg yimeddukal seg **iseggasen snatini (12)** i yellan zdat waydeg d-yeggade tikta.
CGU.s9_s4_p1: RiveHub ur ad tettreffer ɣef kra n ubeddel d-yezgan seg tiγula n uswir-aɣrum, d acu-nni: ayefḍiyen n umaḍal, igeffur n temeddurt, tujarin, asawen n Uneccab, ubeddel n ibabeḍ-inelmaden, neɣ ayaggar n iseγwanen.
CGU.s10_s1_p1: Yimeddukal ay-yezmer ad seggel trabbut tarmadt di kra n wakud seg yisettayen n ukaunt neɣ seg uleqqem n taseft Stripe. Asawen ay-d-yettaker di taggara n tseggit tarmadt tadiggant.
CGU.s10_s2_p1: RiveHub ay-tesɛa izref ad aḥel neɣ ad seggel usudel n yimeddukal deg waydeg n ubeddel n ujagaren-agi, seqdec aggur n uswir, taggade n taseft, neɣ kra n uggyur d-iseɣtay ad yessafed uswir neɣ yimeddukal-inelmaden. Yimeddukal ay-d-yettwabzer s imayl zdat asawen, cceṛ deg tignatin tizzlatin.
CGU.s10_s3_p1: Melmi n umeccaṛ, useqdac yesɛa azal n **30 n wussan** iwakken ad yafk isefka-ines s useqdac n isinanen n umeẓli. Afar n umeẓli-a, isefka-ines ad ttwakksent s umata n tsiqelt 6.7. RiveHub teɛaṛ-itt-id ad teg isefka s tɣara yettwaskarren, s aglam i zemren iseqdacen-nsen (CSV, JSON).
CGU.s10_s4_p1: Melmi n umeccaṛ, tuttigin-nni meqqren (POS, aghrebel n tmehwact, umḍiq n internet) ttukksa-d s wudem awurman. Alamaten n OAuth ttugent. Useqdac yessaweḍ ad yesḥaled belli tuttigin-nni ttukksa tidet s umata n kra n wugar.
CGU.s11_p1: RiveHub teḥrez-itt-id ad tebeddel tlufa-yagi tikelt melmi tebɣiḍ. Useqdacen ad ttuwuɛaden ɣef ibeddilen meqqren s e-mail akked uɛelhan n ugraw, s **15 n wussan** a tasweṛt uqbel ad d-tewwi tlufa tamaynut ajenaḥ.
CGU.s11_p2: Aseqdec n umeẓli afar n tukksa n tlufa tamaynut d-yesseḥbib ula azetta n tlufa tamaynut.
CGU.s11_p3: Ma yella useqdac ur yeɛqel ara s ibeddilen, yezmer ad yesseddek taɣult-ines s umata n tsiqelt 10 uqbel ad d-tewwi tlufa tamaynut.
CGU.s12_p1: Tlufa-yagi teɛqel-itt-id s ilugan n Aqanun Quebec d ilugan n federalyun n Kanada yettseqdacen dagi.
CGU.s12_p2: Amgaz meqqren yettili-d seg tlufa-yagi neɣ seg aseqdec n umeẓli ad yili s tsiqelt n unagraw n Quebec, Aɛezba Montreal.
CGU.s12_p3: Ma yella amgaz, kra n yiɣallen qblen ad zerren afus s usnem akked yiwen nniḍen uqbel ad qimen ɣer umḍiq.
CGU.s13_p1: Akken ad d-tesqedceḍ ɣef tlufa-yagi, ɣef tgelda n isefka-ines, neɣ ɣef twuri n umeẓli, ttaqas-aɣ **support@rivehub.com**

AIPage.meta_title: AI i usfeṛṛaj n wexxam n uɛeggut — RiveHub
AIPage.meta_description: Issin amek AI i usfeṛṛaj i temdint teddu-d s uzrif n uqim n umḥal, tuffra HACCP, asebber n menu, akked twuri n tsiga. Tabaɣbagit n AI i ulelli — ulac aɣsan.
AIPage.hero_label: AI i usfeṛṛaj n wexxam n uɛeggut
AIPage.hero_title: Tabaɣbagit n AI i wexxam n uɛeggut
AIPage.hero_description: RiveHub aseqdac AI iwakken ad teddu-d s uzrif tasufeṛṛaj n uqim n umḥal, tuffra HACCP, asebber n menu, akked tigdi n twuri — iwakken ad tcecciḍ ɣef usmekti n yiddukklen, mmi d-ukalem.
AIPage.what_title: D acu ara d-isseg AI i wexxam-ines n uɛeggut?
AIPage.what_description: AI i usfeṛṛaj i temdint tessenta twuri n uzdan s uzrif iqedden. Seg scanner n tfekka ar tigzi n tmeẓlaḥ, tilisa deg tie AI akked taɛwalt n yiwet n tsiga.
AIPage.f1_desc: AI izegger imeẓlaḥ n uxeddim, imḍant n tedṛeft, akked uzemz n yineggura iwakken ad d-isseɣleb tigdi d-yemmisent — ɣef tuma n isefka n ukalas s uɣmis iqedden akked iseqdac.
AIPage.f2_desc: AI taɛammir iɛeffu n tuffra, taɛammir isefka-yanni, akked taneggar n inersiyen i tɣabra — akken ad tili wexxam-inek aɣzel akked heddren i usekti.
AIPage.f3_title: Taɛwalt n uqim n umḥal s tadigant
AIPage.f3_desc: Sufeṛṛeḍ aɣsan n ifeẓẓa, zzeɣ ileqman n uqim, akked uqim n wakal imeqqren — akked udrum. AI tefka-ik-id alɛart uqbel ad ileq uqim s tidett.
AIPage.f4_desc: Taɣbalt neɣ zdem PDF. AI ad issaweq yal tasarut, alif, amḍan, akked uqim — asater n ussan d tmuggit.
AIPage.f5_desc: Zaḍ akayid-ik ameqqran s taɛwalt BCG. AI tseggem tibeddil n menu s uqim n umḥal, tazniqt, akked uqim n wakal.
AIPage.f6_desc: AI aseqdac anaɣ n yiddukklen, iɛellen, akked imenus i tirawt n tutlayin — akken ad issehen yal umeddal ɣef umahil-is.
AIPage.why_title: Acimi i weddukklen-nni ad ibeddlen ɣer AI
AIPage.why_description: Wexxam n uɛeggut iseqdacen AI i usfeṛṛaj d-yettqablen tigdi tameszrut, amḥal agelhan, akked tuffra tazmert. Dacu ara d-ibeddel melmi ara tbeddleḍ tẓuri ɣer usseḥti.
AIPage.b1_title: Ḥubba 15+ n ussan i kra n sdat
AIPage.b1_desc: AI teddu-d s uzrif n usizdeg n tfekka, aɣmis n tuffra, akked iḥisab n uqim yettili-d asahwel s yiddukklen. Tiɣuliman-ik tṭedda kra n wuzwan di yikuccud akked walay di tuggem.
AIPage.b2_title: Segzi n uqim n umḥal ɣef 3-8%
AIPage.b2_desc: Taɛwalt n uqim tamezrut akked usekti n uamḥal ttfelfu wexxam n uɛeggut ad zaḍen akked ad sseqsayen leqdic yeffren — tizwart n umeẓli yettili-d deg uneggar n ussan-a.
AIPage.b3_desc: Asufeḍ n HACCP s wayyaw meɛna ur tettḥeggm ara uqbel ufran. AI yesḥebba izerfan-ik n uwzen s udem aklan, azeyyan, akk d ayen ara tɛeddiḍ s ussan.
AIPage.how_title: Amek RiveHub isseqdec AI deg restaurants-ik
AIPage.how_description: RiveHub mačči d aɣerbaz azemmum s AI ay yezzan fell-as. Yal taɣessa tesbedd ɣef wayen restaurants akken ara ixeddem — seg tseɣwant hegg asadaf.
AIPage.step1_desc: Qqen POS-ik (Toast, Square, Lightspeed, SumUp, Zettle), siler-d ifukulen, akk d yettwassen n tneggura-k. Takabaḥt tessemṛa azegrir n 15 tasdiyin.
AIPage.step2_desc: Zik mi ara lḥun 48 tisseɛatin, AI n RiveHub yissef awal i uneγiγer n ukesɣel-ik, izerfan n useɣɣas, akk d ǧǧes n uwzen — akk d yebda yeffeɣ tiwelhiwin.
AIPage.step3_desc: Tegzi n ɣur sin n wussan iɛalayen ɣef tɣeltin n tqast n iḍeffiren, aɣbalun n uwzen awtamaten, iẓaṛ n umɣaruf n lǧan, akk d ilinwa n tasmakt iwaliyen — akk d idinɣa n userrujyu.
AIPage.step4_desc: Mi ara yaqqim restaurant-ik, AI yessaɣur tidi — aɣennu imelyaten n izaɣraden, asif n tneggura tamaynut, akk d tɣeltin i yettɛeddin — s war taseḥribt n yizegrir.
AIPage.cta_title: Yah ara tḥeggmeḍ AI deg restaurant-ik?
AIPage.cta_description: Ddu i restaurants n umadal akk ay d-seqdacin RiveHub i uswuri n usxeddam, agzel n ukesɣel, akk d uwzen — s AI.
AIPage.cta_subtext: Ulac card n tɣerfatin. Azegrir baṭel, ahil ṛṛay.

FAQ.title: Isteqsiwt i d-yeqqimen i yal ass
FAQ.subtitle: Ayen akk i tesreḥ ad tẓurit send ma d-tebdu
FAQ.q1_q: Amek i d-yetteqqen RiveHub ɣ unaṛif POS-inu?
FAQ.q1_a: RiveHub yetteqqen s umata ɣ unaṛif POS azayun ihi Toast, Square, SumUp, Lightspeed, neɣ Zettle. Asnerni yeg-d d asersi 5 n tsesdatin — muqqel kan taɣbult neɣ isefka-inek ad-ttunin s ufus.
FAQ.q2_q: Isefka n usehtim-inu yella-d s tzeqqa?
FAQ.q2_a: Yah, akkin i d-yessalin. Isefka akk i d-yettwaxelmeq, asqed Supabase neɣ tiqviqin n useqdu s wayen tektawin. Isefka-inek d-yegdel kan s tikkelt-ik, ur yettazenz ara neɣ ur yettabɛ ara.
FAQ.q3_a: Asnerni azayun yeg-d d asersi 15 n tsesdatin. Seqqed POS-ik, asmeslay neɣ tikkelt-ik, RiveHub ad-d-yebdu ad issin izeggaten-ik. Ad-k-d-tazzin tignawtin-ik akkin 48 n tsaɛatin.
FAQ.q4_q: Acu i d-yeḥla dagi n yiwen n uplan azayun?
FAQ.q4_a: Uplan Essence azayun ur yella ara talast — seqdec-it cqal ma tebɣiḍ. Ticki ara txemmamt ad tesmeslay isɛurin AI ihi asnagem-cargo seg sonar neɣ isefka n HACCP, geqqel ɣ Horizon neɣ Intelligence akkin.
FAQ.q5_q: Yezmer-d tikkelt-ik ad seqdecen RiveHub s tutlayt-nsen?
FAQ.q5_a: Yah. RiveHub yesɛa {count} n tutlawin neɣ tafransist — seg Tafrensist neɣ Taɛeggluzt armi d Bengali, Taqbaylit neɣ Takantunsit. Yal uhali, iferdis deg udlis-tamezwarut neɣ isuraz n tzeqqa ad-ttunin s tutlayt yal amdan. Ur yella ara tafransist ɣ yiwen n weswir.
FAQ.q6_a: RiveHub d ilef ad t-seqdecen. Tanabrawt d tallunt neɣ yeqqaren-t talawt — tikkelt-ik tezmer ad t-seqdec akkin. Ayen nniḍen, nettafu tawuri n usnerni neɣ taqburt-nneɣ d-tettɣum s yisem.
FAQ.q7_a: RiveHub d udlis n umahil-ik i d-yessuffɣen s ufus. Asumen n teqvalt i yal ass, asnerni n zzit, neɣ isegwan i d-ttazzin kan d-ayen waγ ifehmen ula d yiwen i yessuten, war takkit tayin.
